name: Shenzhen Anche Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Anche Technologies Co., Ltd. provides motor vehicle inspection, industry regulation and supervision, driver examination system, and intelligent maintenance industry services and management solutions in China. It offers motor vehicle inspection systems, such as motor vehicle testing line, security line equipment, inspection line, comprehensive inspection line, loop inspection line, motorized inspection line, and maintenance equipment; industry supervision networking platform; motor vehicle driver examination systems; automobile factory test equipment, including new vehicle testing line, new energy automobile testing line, rain testing room, four-wheel positioning, and vehicle washing machines; and vehicle inspection appointment system. The company is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
